{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/49341894?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Ry0taK", "id": 49341894, "login": "Ry0taK", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ5MzQxODk0", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Ry0taK", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2024-52011", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-77", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in a Command ('Command Injection')"}], "description": "### Summary
Due to the insufficient sanitization of the `file` argument in the `launchEditor`, an attacker can execute arbitrary commands on Windows by supplying a filename that contains special characters.

### Impact
If the following conditions are met, an attacker can execute arbitrary commands on the computer that is using the `launch-editor`:

- An attacker can place a file with the malicious filename
- An attacker can call the `launchEditor` method with the `file` argument controlled
- The `launch-editor` package is running on Windows

For example, some development server using this package satisfy these conditions, as a malicious website might be able to force the downloading of a file and the path of that file is predictable.

### Patch
This issue has been fixed in the `launch-editor` version 2.9.0 ([commit](https://github.com/vitejs/launch-editor/commit/971291e8a6a91226e1616c5c0ec85423d2d50a5e)).", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00521, "percentile": 0.40534}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T18:02:48Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2024-52011"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-01T19:16:18Z", "published_at": "2026-06-03T18:02:48Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vitejs/launch-editor/security/advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "https://github.com/yyx990803/launch-editor/security/advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-52011", "https://github.com/vitejs/launch-editor/commit/971291e8a6a91226e1616c5c0ec85423d2d50a5e", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vitejs/launch-editor/security-advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vitejs/launch-editor", "summary": "launch-editor vulnerable to command injection via the crafted request on Windows", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T18:02:48Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-c27g-q93r-2cwf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.9.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "launch-editor"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.8.2"}, {"first_patched_version": "5.4.9", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "vite"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.4.8"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: launch-editor vulnerable to command injection via the crafted request on Windows
